data.name: Error1
data.value: {0} feature not implement at this time.
data.comment: Message when a SimML file is trying to execute a feature that is not implemented yet.

data.name: Error11
data.value: Failed to read license. Please check the license entry and contact FocusedObjective.com support if you believe you have a valid license file. Remove the '<?xml...' declaration line from the top of your file if it exists.

data.name: Error12
data.value: License signature match fail. The license text doesn't match the signature. This occurs if the license text has been modified from its original content.

data.name: Error13
data.value: No license element found.

data.name: Error14
data.value: No license element. Using free license which is limited in functionality. Go to focusedobjective.com to request a trial or buy a fully featured license.

data.name: Error15
data.value: License limits the number of simulation cycles to {0}. Go to focusedobjective.com and request a trial license or purchase a full license.

data.name: Error16
data.value: License doesn't have the {0} feature enabled. Go to focusedobjective.com and request a trial license or purchase a full license.

data.name: Error17
data.value: License has expired. Go to focusedobjective.com and request a trial license or purchase a full license.

data.name: Error18
data.value: Attribute value for 'occurrenceHighBound' must be greater than the value for 'occurrenceLowBound' for the added scope section named {0}.

data.name: Error19
data.value: Attribute value for 'estimateHighBound' must be greater than the value for 'estimateLowBound' for the blocking event section named {0}.

data.name: Error2
data.value: Simulation did not complete within {0} simulation intervals. This is either due to a model error, or due to the 'limitIntervalsTo' attribute value of the 'execute' section being too low.
data.comment: Simulation didn't complete within the limit of intervals defined.

data.name: Error20
data.value: Attribute value for 'occurrenceHighBound' must be greater than the value for 'occurrenceLowBound' for the blocking event section named {0}.

data.name: Error21
data.value: No setup/columns/column Id found that matches the specified columnId for the blocking event section named {0}.

data.name: Error22
data.value: No setup/columns/column Id or startsInColumnId found that matches the specified columnId for the defect section named {0}.

data.name: Error23
data.value: Attribute value for 'occurrenceHighBound' must be greater than (or equal) the value for 'occurrenceLowBound' for the defect section named {0}.

data.name: Error24
data.value: No setup/columns/column Id found that matches the specified columnId in the setup/defects/defect/column section with id={0}.

data.name: Error25
data.value: Attribute value for 'estimateHighBound' must be greater than the value for 'estimateLowBound' in the setup/defects/defect/column section with id={0}.

data.name: Error26
data.value: Attribute value for 'estimateHighBound' must be greater than the value for 'estimateLowBound' for the custom backlog section entry named {0}.

data.name: Error27
data.value: Attribute value for 'percentageHighBound' must be greater than the value for 'percentageLowBound' for the custom backlog section entry named {0}.

data.name: Error28
data.value: Attribute value for 'estimateHighBound' must be greater than the value for 'estimateLowBound' for the setup/backlog/custom/column section entry with id={0}.

data.name: Error29
data.value: No setup/columns/column Id found that matches the specified columnId for the setup/backlog/custom/column section entry with id={0}.

data.name: Error3
data.value: Missing mandatory element: '{0}'

data.name: Error30
data.value: Invalid Date format specified in '{0}' section. Please format dates to be in the YYYYMMDD format or the format specifiec in the 'dateFormat' attribute of the 'execute' section.

data.name: Error31
data.value: The 'workdays' attribute cannot be an empty string for the execute/forecastDate section. This value is a comma-separated list of days of the week that work will occur. For example "monday,tuesday,wednesday,thursday,friday".

data.name: Error32
data.value: The 'workdays' attribute is invalid for the execute/forecastDate section. This value is a comma-separated list of days of the week that work will occur. For example "monday,tuesday,wednesday,thursday,friday".

data.name: Error33
data.value: Attribute value for 'estimateHighBound' must be greater than the value for 'estimateLowBound' for the defect section named {0}.

data.name: Error34
data.value: Attribute value for 'estimateHighBound' must be greater than the value for 'estimateLowBound' for the Added Scope section named {0}.

data.name: Error35
data.value: Unable to save video file to location {0}. Save failed with the error message: {1}

data.name: Error36
data.value: Sensitivity type must be iterations when simulating Scrum. Simulation type set to Iterations.

data.name: Error37
data.value: Not enough distribution arguments specified for distribution. This distribution requires at least {0} arguments.

data.name: Error38
data.value: Invalid distribution argument. Argument number {0} in the argument string {1} could not be converted to a number.

data.name: Error39
data.value: Invalid distribution argument. Argument number {0} is an invalid value for the distribution.

data.name: Error4
data.value: Missing mandatory attribute '{0}' for element '{1}'

data.name: Error40
data.value: Parameters for the '{0}' distribution are: {1}. See {2} for more information.

data.name: Error41
data.value: Missing optional attribute '{0}' for element '{1}'. Default used '{2}'
data.comment: General informational message for list attributes vales that are omitted.

data.name: Error42
data.value: Invalid value for attribute '{0}' for element '{1}'. '{2}' is not recognized or valid.

data.name: Error43
data.value: Attribute '{0}' for element '{1}' must have a value greater than {2}.

data.name: Error44
data.value: Attribute value for 'estimateHighBound' must be greater than the value for 'estimateLowBound' for the column named '{0}' with an id={1} .

data.name: Error45
data.value: Attribute value for 'maxWip' must be greater than the value for 'minWip' for the execute/addStaff/column with an id={0}.

data.name: Error46
data.value: No setup/columns/column Id found that matched the specified Id in the execute/addStaff/column with an id={0}.

data.name: Error47
data.value: No distribution with the name '{0}' is defined in the setup/distributions section for the {1} section named {2}.

data.name: Error48
data.value: Attribute value for 'endPercentage' must be greater than the value for 'startPercentage' for the phase section entry named {0}.

data.name: Error49
data.value: Attribute '{0}' for element '{1}' must have a value less than {2}.

data.name: Error5
data.value: At least one '{0}' sub-element is needed

data.name: Error50
data.value: It is recommended that all {0} sections have a name.

data.name: Error51
data.value: The phase named '{0}' overlaps with the phase named '{1}'. There can be no overlap in start and end attribute values between phases.

data.name: Error52
data.value: Invalid Date format specified in '{0}' section named '{1}'. Please format dates to be in the YYYYMMDD format or the format specifiec in the 'dateFormat' attribute of the 'execute' section.

data.name: Error53
data.value: No default class of service specified in 'setup/classOfServices'. Add a default="true" to one of the defined classes of services that will be used if no class of service is specified.

data.name: Error54
data.value: No class of service named '{0}' can be found in the section '{1}' named '{2}'.

data.name: Error55
data.value: Invalid numeric value for attribute '{0}' in element '{1}'. '{2}' is not recognized as a numerical value.

data.name: Error56
data.value: Unable to create '{0}' distribution named '{1}'. No valid samples, or a non-numeric sample were found or the supplied 'Count' attribute was less than zero. Count must be greater than 0 and samples must be numeric and separated by '|' or a new-line character, or a ',' for locales that do not use that symbol as a decimal separator.

data.name: Error57
data.value: '{0}' is an invalid variable name. Variable can only contain upper and lowercase letters (a-Z) and underscore (_)characters.

data.name: Error58
data.value: Attribute value for 'end' must be greater than the value for 'start' for the phase section entry named {0}.

data.name: Error59
data.value: Formula error '{3}' returned for attribute value for '{0}' in element '{1}'. Formula was: '{2}'

data.name: Error6
data.value: For Kanban simulation, at least one 'column' entry in the 'columns' section needs to be defined

data.name: Error60
data.value: No setup/columns/column Id found that matches the specified 'initialColumn' for the setup/backlog/custom section entry initialColumn={0}.

data.name: Error61
data.value: One or more deliverables '{0}' cannot be found in setup/backlog/deliverable section for the {1} section named {2}.

data.name: Error62
data.value: No custom backlog named '{0}' can be found in the section '{1}' for the addedScope named '{2}'.

data.name: Error63
data.value: No backlog deliverable named '{0}' can be found in the section '{1}' for the addedScope named '{2}'.

data.name: Error64
data.value: No custom backlog named '{0}' can be found in the section '{1}' for the defect named '{2}'.

data.name: Error65
data.value: No backlog deliverable named '{0}' can be found in the section '{1}' for the defect named '{2}'.

data.name: Error66
data.value: No custom backlog named '{0}' can be found in the section '{1}' for the blockingEvent named '{2}'.

data.name: Error67
data.value: No backlog deliverable named '{0}' can be found in the section '{1}' for the blockingEvent named '{2}'.

data.name: Error68
data.value: Attribute '{0}' for element '{1}' must have a value greater than or equal {2}.

data.name: Error7
data.value: One or more phases '{0}' cannot be found in setup/phases section for the {1} section named {2}.

data.name: Error8
data.value: Column 'id' values must be unique. Duplicate column id values are not allowed. Column id values can be any integer value, with columns being ordered left to right from lowest to highest id value. They are used as references when defining events.

data.name: Info1
data.value: Attribute value for '{0}' in element '{1}' changed from '{2}' to '{3}'

data.name: Info2
data.value: Value for variable '{0}' changed from '{1}' to '{2}'

data.name: Message1
data.value: No column could be adjusted to achieve goal. Add more movable wip limit columns to the addStaff command, or increase the maxWip attribute for a column.
